---
title: "SkateRayRichness publication four-panel"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup_skate_ray_publication}
# File: 03_SkateRayRichnessPublication.Rmd. Reversed viridis: 03b_SkateRayRichnessPublicationReversed.Rmd.
# Self-contained: does not rely on 02_SpeciesRichnessMaps.Rmd map chunk objects.
# Prerequisites: data/processed/hex_with_metrics_skates.rds and ..._rays.rds

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(patchwork)
library(rnaturalearth)

source(here("mapping/00_functions.R"))

hex_metrics_skates_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_skates.rds")
hex_metrics_rays_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_rays.rds")
if (!file.exists(hex_metrics_skates_path) || !file.exists(hex_metrics_rays_path)) {
  stop("Missing hex_with_metrics_*.rds. Run 01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd then 02_SpeciesRichnessMaps.Rmd first.")
}
hex_with_metrics_skates <- readRDS(hex_metrics_skates_path)
hex_with_metrics_rays <- readRDS(hex_metrics_rays_path)

# Match 02_SpeciesRichnessMaps.Rmd setup_species_richness_maps for aligned maps + scatters (°N WGS84)
pub_lat_ylim_deg <- c(-90, 90)
```

```{r publication_four_panel}
date_tag <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")

# Publication PNG: match 03b (~11.4k × 4.2k px); column width used for pt → NPC legend nudge
pub_fig_width_in <- 19
pub_fig_height_in <- 7
pub_fig_dpi <- 600
pub_panel_width_in <- pub_fig_width_in / 2

add_lat_lon <- function(sf_obj) {
  pts <- st_point_on_surface(sf_obj)
  pts_ll <- st_transform(pts, 4326)
  coords <- st_coordinates(pts_ll)
  sf_obj$lon <- coords[, "X"]
  sf_obj$lat <- coords[, "Y"]
  sf_obj
}

plot_lat_richness <- function(sf_obj, title_text, lat_limits, lat_ylim = NULL) {
  plot_df <- sf_obj %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    mutate(lat = as.numeric(lat)) %>%
    filter(is.finite(lat), is.finite(species_richness), species_richness > 0) %>%
    mutate(lat_bin = floor(lat / 5) * 5)

  p95_df <- plot_df %>%
    group_by(lat_bin) %>%
    summarise(
      lat_mid = dplyr::first(lat_bin) + 2.5,
      richness_p95 = quantile(species_richness, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(lat_mid)

  loess_fit <- loess(richness_p95 ~ lat_mid, data = p95_df, span = 0.5)
  p95_df$richness_fit <- pmax(0, predict(loess_fit, newdata = p95_df))

  y_lim <- if (is.null(lat_ylim)) {
    range(c(plot_df$lat, p95_df$lat_mid, lat_limits), na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    lat_ylim
  }
  scatter_x_max <- 65
  # Legend NPC x: inset + 5 richness units right, then 2 pt left (ggplot2 needs numeric NPC, not unit()).
  legend_x_npc <- pmin(1, 0.94 + 5 / scatter_x_max) - (2 / 72) / pub_panel_width_in
  legend_x_npc <- pmax(0, legend_x_npc)

  # Scatter colour: viridis direction -1; 03b uses direction = 1.
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = species_richness, y = lat)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = species_richness), size = 1.2, alpha = 1) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "D", direction = -1) +
    geom_path(
      data = p95_df,
      aes(x = richness_fit, y = lat_mid),
      color = "grey75",
      linewidth = 0.7,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, scatter_x_max),
      expand = c(0, 0),
      breaks = c(0, 20, 40, 60)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = seq(-90, 90, by = 30),
      labels = lat_break_labels
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = c(0, scatter_x_max),
      ylim = y_lim,
      expand = FALSE
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title.position = "plot",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0),
      legend.position = c(legend_x_npc, 0.07),
      legend.justification = c(1, 0),
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.margin = margin(2, 4, 4, 4, "pt")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Species richness",
      y = "Latitude",
      color = "Richness"
    )
}

hex_with_metrics_skates <- add_lat_lon(hex_with_metrics_skates)
hex_with_metrics_rays <- add_lat_lon(hex_with_metrics_rays)

lat_limits <- range(
  c(hex_with_metrics_skates$lat, hex_with_metrics_rays$lat),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# Maps: default fill viridis (direction -1) from plot_species_richness_map(); 03b overrides to direction = 1.
skate_map <- plot_species_richness_map(
  hex_with_metrics_skates,
  map_title = NULL,
  ylim_lat_deg = pub_lat_ylim_deg
) %>%
  apply_lat_axis_labels()

ray_map <- plot_species_richness_map(
  hex_with_metrics_rays,
  map_title = NULL,
  ylim_lat_deg = pub_lat_ylim_deg
) %>%
  apply_lat_axis_labels()

map_title_nudge_pt <- 0

skate_map <- skate_map +
  labs(title = "a. skate richness", tag = NULL) +
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 12,
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(l = map_title_nudge_pt, b = 4, unit = "pt")
    ),
    plot.tag = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(4, 2, 2, 2, "pt")
  )

ray_map <- ray_map +
  labs(title = "c. ray richness", tag = NULL) +
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 12,
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(l = map_title_nudge_pt, b = 4, unit = "pt")
    ),
    plot.tag = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 4, 2, "pt")
  )

skate_plot <- plot_lat_richness(
  hex_with_metrics_skates,
  "b. skate richness vs. latitude",
  lat_limits,
  lat_ylim = pub_lat_ylim_deg
) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 2, 2, 2, "pt"))

ray_plot <- plot_lat_richness(
  hex_with_metrics_rays,
  "d. ray richness by latitude",
  lat_limits,
  lat_ylim = pub_lat_ylim_deg
) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 4, 2, "pt"))

four_panel <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  skate_map,
  skate_plot,
  ray_map,
  ray_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 2,
  byrow = TRUE,
  widths = grid::unit(c(-1, 1), c("null", "null")),
  heights = c(1, 1)
)

ggsave(
  filename = here(sprintf("mapping/figures/SkateRayRichness_withLatitude_%s.png", date_tag)),
  plot = four_panel,
  width = pub_fig_width_in,
  height = pub_fig_height_in,
  units = "in",
  dpi = pub_fig_dpi,
  bg = "white"
)
```
